name: SKYBLITZ
short_description: Skyblitz is a fast-paced helicopter action game inspired by classic arcade shooters, set in a fragile post-collapse world. Engage in explosive missions, outmaneuver missile fire, and unravel a conspiracy that threatens to reignite global war.
detailed_description:
In 2060, the world survived nuclear collapse. Barely.

New powers rose from the ashes and fragile alliances hold what remains of civilization together. The warheads that nearly ended everything were destroyed and disposed of — and meant to stay that way.

But now it seems the nuke threat is present once more.

When dormant weapons begin targeting the UA, their elite unit known as Team TWISTED is deployed to contain the threat before the world spirals back into chaos.

Fast, Explosive Combat

Take control of a fully armed combat helicopter and complete a series of handcrafted missions across dangerous territories.

• Destroy enemy convoys, bases, and armored units
• Weave through missile fire and intercept incoming threats
• Master tight, responsive helicopter controls
• Balance aggression with survival

Every mission escalates. Every mistake matters.

Meet Team TWISTED

• TWISTED – The player-controlled pilot. Adaptable. Precise. The last line of defense.

• Agent Soul – Fearless, and unshakably focused, who thrives in the chaos others can’t survive.

• Agent Ears – Intelligence specialist guiding you through hostile territory.

• Agent Arms – Tactical field commander with nerves of steel.

As alliances fracture and motives shift, the line between mission and manipulation begins to blur.

Retro DNA, Modern Feel

SKYBLITZ captures the spirit of classic 90s action shooters while updating the experience for modern players.

• Stylized visuals with dynamic effects
• An explosive and story-inspired original soundtrack
• Gamepad and keyboard support
• Designed for quick sessions or full campaign runs

Customize Your Experience

Choose your pilot and personalize your identity before heading into battle. Unlock co-pilots with unique personalities and abilities.

How you approach the journey is yours to decide.

supported_languages: English, Russian, Spanish - Latin America, Ukrainian, Filipino
